failure_reason: Cannot authenticate as SuperAdmin (fayaz@nulogic.io). Account is locked (HTTP 423 — AccountLockoutService 5 attempts/15min). Fallback EMPLOYEE (sarankarthick.maran@nulogic.io) returns 401 Bad credentials. Tab 1283664296 started in a stale session as saran@nulogic.io (EMPLOYEE role); role mismatch prevents executing SuperAdmin regression battery (F-01, F-10, F-12 require payroll/employees which EMPLOYEE cannot access). Auth rate-limit (5/min) across parallel workers compounded the lockout.

pages.note: 403 expected for EMPLOYEE; inconclusive for SuperAdmin F-01 verification
403 expected for EMPLOYEE; inconclusive for SuperAdmin F-01 verification

regressions.reason: SuperAdmin login locked; cannot verify bypass

bugs.title: SuperAdmin account fayaz@nulogic.io locked during parallel E2E run — blocks all SuperAdmin workers
repro: Parallel workers each attempt login as fayaz@nulogic.io
AccountLockoutService triggers after 5 failed attempts within 15min
All subsequent SuperAdmin logins return HTTP 423 Account Locked
Recovery requires 15min wait or admin unlock
bugs.recommendation: For multi-worker super-e2e runs: either (a) share a single pre-established SuperAdmin session cookie across workers, (b) stagger logins >60s apart and use dedicated SuperAdmin test accounts per worker, or (c) disable account-lockout for test tenant
